programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Sing Cowboy Sing
programme.desc: Joe and Benny are two cowboys are on tour in the Wild West as a singing duo usually without a penny in their pockets to spare Joe is a talented rodeo-rider which fascinates the little girl Susanne and gives her the wish to have him as a father Her mother Maria however is to marry the evil rich farmer Dave Susanne wants to stop the wedding so she sneaks aboard Joe and Bennys wagon to persuade them to intervene Dave brands them as kidnappers forcing them to flee as outlaws to one of the families tyrannized by Dave Together they strike back at Dave at which point Maria sees that hes the wrong man for her

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Wacky hijinks of counselors and campers at a less-than-average summer camp

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: The Hair Bears introduce Peevly to an imaginary 10-foot rabbit named Arnie to convince him that he is overworked and needs a vacation

programme.title: Hong 105
programme.desc: Hong 105

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt2
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: In 1942 two German battle-cruisers the Scharnhorst and the Gneisenau put into a French port for repairs and became trapped there targets to be bombed at will by the RAF It was only a matter of time before they would attempt an escape Churchill ordered that the ships must not reach Germany and that they must be destroyed The plan to do so was called Operation Fuller However when the moment came to put the operation into action the plans were locked in a safe and the only man with a key was away on holiday What happened next was a series of one farcical mistake after another which allowed the two German ships to sail right up the English channel and home to Germany The programme also features Operation Eagle Claw the clandestine operation ordered by President Carter in 1980 to free the American hostages held in the Tehran embassy The newly formed Special Operations Group Delta Force began planning a daring rescue However inter-service rivalry intervened with tragic results when the American aircraft carrying the rescue teams crashed into each other in the Iranian desert

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: Costly defeats made possible by commanders who disastrously underestimated their enemies

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A faux blind woman uses a young man obsessed with her to get rid of her husband

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is captured by a deranged scientist who uses an antique silver syringe to extract brain fluids from prostitutes

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy and elderly man subjects himself to a revolutionary new treatment in order to please his gold-digger girlfriend Unfortunately becoming young again turns out to be very expensive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ travels to Florida to visit his war buddy Charlie Broler but a helicopter crash cuts short the friendly reunion BJ and an eager marine patrolwoman set to work unraveling the mystery Musical performances from Sister Sledge and Jim Stafford highlight the episode

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Suspecting a security leak at Stalag 13 Gen Burkhalter goes fishing with some false information and Col Hogan falls for the bait As a result Burkhalter plants a spy among the prisoners to expose the guilty parties

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An assertive Gen Burkhalter requisitions the famous Édouard Manet painting The Fife Player from the Louvre museum in Paris to give to Hermann Goering as a birthday present Undaunted by seemingly impossible logistics Hogan and LeBeau decide to steal it back

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Complications develop when McHale and the 73 crew go after a Japanese pilot known as Washing Machine Charlie who has been attacking the Taratupa base on a daily basis

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton suspects McHale and the 73 Crew of consorting with the enemy when a Japanese radio announcer broadcasts personal details about Binghamton that only someone close to him would know

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carters mission

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When the McCoys learn that hometown girl Glory is a Hollywood celebrity Luke fears Kate will be dissatisfied with her life when the McCoys visit her so when Glory comes to visit the McCoy men try to paint Kates life rosier than it is

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: Hellbound
programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Tomboy Rosemary Rocky Simpson Melissa Gilbert has a shipboard romance with teenager Norman Jimmy Baio; Julies Lauren Tewes parents Betty Garrett and Norman Fell break the news that they are getting a divorce; two prudes Marion James Coco and Patricia Dody Goodman are booked into the same cabin because Marion is a man who has a female name

programme.title: WKRP 110
programme.desc: WKRP 110

programme.title: WKRP 205
programme.desc: WKRP 205

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: uring a town-wide flu epidemic the biology teacher gets sick and Herman Stiles winds up substitute-teaching sex education for her

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood has to decide whether to allow women to try out for the football team

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Newlywed Gary Cole goes to buy some jewelry for his wife Wendy and disappears When Wendy realizes hes missing nobody that she questions seems to recognize the couple Her hysteria only hampers Dans investigation

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: An innocent woman is blackmailed by her ex-husband into using their son to extort money from Jonathan

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael breaks up with Stephanie after Dick tells him not to always let her have her way

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Belmans daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election somebody who will stand up to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane makes a woman look like Hollands wife He makes sure Holland aka Swamp Thing sees her He approaches her and she runs away He later tests her She then asks him for his notes hoping it could help him But Arcane is after one of his formulas At the same time Holland recalls his last moments with his wife and moment when he became Swamp Thing because of Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Moonbase Alpha is attacked and devastated by warships from a nearby planet With half of its population dead Alpha can no longer survive Commander Koenig and Dr Russel go to the alien world to plead for the survivors but the inhabitants wish no one to disturb their serene existence

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 214
programme.desc: Hercules 214

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Maiya experiences dimensional phasing Augur and Liam believe they need to bring Isabel and Maiya together to let the universe merge them Jonathan Doors announces his presidential candidacy and meets with Zoor

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jack Cole was arrested and imprisoned for stealing art treasures of a Latin nation The mission for Phelps and the IM team is to get the objects back But that wont be easy Coles being tortured by the colonel who heads the prison -- and the colonels a traitor who wants the treasure for himself The IMF plans calls for playing the 2 men each deadly off each other

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A friendly country girl has a crush on Kimble and wants to help him escape on the condition she can go with him as the Sheriff and Lt Gerard close in on them

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: As unrest grips a distant mining town where the Barkleys have financial interests Heath travels to the place in an attempt to diffuse the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is forced to join an outlaw gang lead by the Ghost of the Cimarron He is the only person who can clear Cheyenne with the law who was framed for reward money Over time Cheyenne comes to realize why the man is respected

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A traveling hit-woman seduces Inspector Keller gaining valuable intelligence for her San Francisco assignments A mob hired her to help win a gang war which Keller is investigating Kellers superior Lt Mike Stone hears wedding bells but death knells are more likely as shes living in a bay-side apartment next to the younger love-struck Keller

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The Dre Infinite Capri Compton Interview
programme.desc: From different worlds and 2 different culturals Meet the rap star and the opera star who got together an made a few hits

programme.title: The Jaxx Kellerman Interview
programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.title: The Harold Vann II Interview
programme.desc: Hear the riveting story of a preacher whose promiscuous life almost destroyed him

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Brand new army planes are disappearing just before they are about to land at McKenna Airfield The owner Dutch McKenna asks his friend Matt Trakker for help

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Penny and Talon compete to solve the mystery of the Sphinx while Gadget is stuck with a riddle of his own

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget is on the hunt for signs of Dr Claws latest medical experiment but Penny finds it first

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter trades in his holographic powers for a powerful new blaster and learns that power isnt all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegade wreak havoc on Earth while disguised as Guardians and the terrified humans ask Leader-1 to take his people off Earth

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: With a few clues and a little conjuring Gillian produces a map showing the destination of the original Lightning League that disappeared years ago In a far off place untouched by Saw Boss Jayce is disgusted to find them playing war games

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses a reversing machine to rob casinos in Las Vegas Matt calls in the MASK team to stop the heists and return the money
